channel.title: KillBait RSS Feed
channel.description: KillBait - News highlights delivered clearly and responsibly—no clickbait, no sensationalism

item.title: Iran-US Conflict Stalemate Risks Global Economic Turmoil Over Strait of Hormuz
item.description: The US-Iran conflict lingers in a tense stalemate following Donald Trump's announcement of an indefinite ceasefire, halting planned attacks on Iran pending a deal. Despite Iran's foreign minister visi...

item.title: PCB announces ticket sale details and pricing for HBL PSL 11 final in Lahore
item.description: The Pakistan Cricket Board (PCB) has officially announced that tickets for the HBL Pakistan Super League (PSL) Season 11 final will be available for purchase starting April 27. The much-awaited final ...

item.title: Global Economic and Food Systems Under Pressure Amid Iran Conflict
item.description: The ongoing US-Israel conflict with Iran is causing widespread disruption across global energy, food, and financial systems. According to analysts at the World Resources Institute (WRI), the conflict ...

item.title: Tinubu Faces Backlash Over Focus on UAE Attacks Amid Rising Insecurity in Nigeria
item.description: President Bola Tinubu don come under heavy criticism from Nigerians after he publicly condemned recent attacks on civilian and economic infrastructure in the United Arab Emirates, while many citizens ...

item.title: Australian Economy Update: Fuel Costs, Tax Relief, and AI's Impact
item.description: This week has seen some pretty significant shifts in the Aussie economy. Global oil prices have taken a bit of a jump thanks to ongoing tensions in the Middle East, which is threatening to push up pet...

item.title: U.S. Cancels Diplomatic Visit to Pakistan Amid Shifting Iran Negotiation Strategy
item.description: U.S. President Donald Trump has cancelled a planned visit by two American envoys to Pakistan, a move that complicates ongoing diplomatic efforts related to tensions involving Iran. The trip had been i...

item.title: Election Commission reviews preparedness in Kolkata ahead of West Bengal Phase 2 polls
item.description: With the second phase of West Bengal assembly elections scheduled for April 29, a high-level coordination meeting is planned in Kolkata to evaluate readiness across major districts. The meeting will t...

item.title: Understanding Roundabout Signalling Rules in Canada
item.description: Navigating roundabouts can be confusing for drivers, especially in Canada where these traffic features are still relatively uncommon. While many drivers may not signal at all, it's important to signal...

item.title: Johannesburg Inner City Regeneration: A Student Housing Success Story
item.description: Johannesburg’s inner city, long plagued by hijacked buildings and urban decay, is seeing a glimmer of hope. The article highlights the remarkable turnaround of Remington House, once a notorious, overc...

item.title: Impala in Soho delivers an eclectic, bold and highly original dining experience
item.description: Grace Dent reviews Impala, a new Soho restaurant from the Super 8 group, known for acclaimed venues such as Brat, Mountain, Kiln and Smoking Goat. Led by former Kiln head chef Meedu Saad, Impala arriv...

item.title: CBN increases ATM card issuance fee to ₦1,500, removes monthly maintenance charges
item.description: The Central Bank of Nigeria don raise the fee wey person go pay to get ATM card from ₦1,000 to ₦1,500, meaning say customers go dey pay extra ₦500 for new or replacement cards. Dis change cover people...

item.title: Suspected Gunman at White House Dinner Identified as California Teacher
item.description: A Californian teacher, identified as Cole Allen, is the suspect in a shooting incident that occurred at a White House Correspondents’ Dinner on Saturday night. The 31-year-old, previously honoured as ...

item.title: PUC Chairman Tahir Ashrafi Harassed by PTI Supporters in London
item.description: Pakistan Ulema Council (PUC) Chairman Hafiz Tahir Ashrafi was heckled in central London by a group of individuals believed to be supporters of Pakistan Tehreek-e-Insaf (PTI). The incident occurred whi...

item.title: Letters Highlight Concerns Over Ontario's Fast-Tracked FOI Changes
item.description: The Globe and Mail's letters section on April 26 featured various reader contributions, with one focusing on the Ontario government's proposed changes to freedom-of-information (FOI) laws. Jerome Daly...

item.title: Ciza dominates at Metro FM Music Awards, scooping Best Male and Artist of the Year
item.description: Ciza, the talented hit-maker behind 'Isaka', emerged as the big winner at the 20th Metro FM Music Awards held at the Durban ICC. He took home two prestigious awards: Best Male and Artist of the Year. ...

item.title: Pakistan: Government Seeks to Simplify Solar Energy Adoption
item.description: The Power Division in Pakistan has formally requested the National Electric Power Regulatory Authority (Nepra) to abolish the requirement for licenses and associated fees for consumers installing sola...

item.title: NCC Begins Automatic Airtime Payouts for Poor Network Service
item.description: Na so the NCC don start automatic airtime compensation for Nigerians wey dey suffer network wahala for MTN, Airtel, Glo, and 9mobile. From April 2026, if your area (LGA) experience network failure, li...

item.title: SusHi Tech Tokyo 2026 Highlights Emerging AI, Robotics, and Resilience Innovations
item.description: SusHi Tech Tokyo 2026 is positioning itself as a leading technology event by focusing on four clearly defined areas: AI, robotics, urban resilience, and entertainment. The conference emphasizes practi...

item.title: AAP petitions Rajya Sabha to disqualify seven MPs who joined BJP
item.description: The Aam Aadmi Party (AAP) has formally approached the Rajya Sabha chairman, Vice President CP Radhakrishnan, requesting the disqualification of seven MPs who recently left the party and joined the Bha...

item.title: LA Students Receive Free Prom Dresses and Tuxedos at Annual Giveaway Event
item.description: Hundreds of high school students from across Los Angeles County attended the 10th Annual Prom Dress & Tux Gift-Away and Resource Fair at the Sheraton Gateway Los Angeles Hotel on April 25, 2026. Hoste...
